_readme: Registry of extra Central Economy types files to load WITHOUT touching vanilla db/types.xml. At prestart, Apply-CustomCE.ps1 copies each 'from' file into the active mission's custom/ folder as 'name', then regenerates ONE <ce folder="custom"> block in that mission's cfgeconomycore.xml listing them. 'from' is relative to the DayZ server dir: use custom-ce/<file> for our own repo-authored types, or a mod's doc path (e.g. @aibandits/doc/bandit_types.xml) to pull the mod's own file so it tracks the installed mod version - never hand-duplicated. Add a modded types file = add ONE line here. Missing/invalid sources are skipped fail-soft; vanilla types.xml is never touched; a game update that rewrites cfgeconomycore.xml gets the block re-added next boot.
